query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN icd_codes_raw = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_codes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN icd_codes_raw IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_codes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN icd_codes_raw != '' AND icd_codes_raw IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_codes
FROM drug_entries
